text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A little while has passed since the Yayoi Sho, and
summer camp season has come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka knows she must become faster,
but she's plagued with concern because of how
heavy and uncooperative her legs are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a disquieting start for this year's summer
camp.
